title: Nods to Eva spinoffs in Rebuild
display_title: Nods to Eva spinoffs in Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Nods to Eva spinoffs in Rebuild             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Jul 20, 2012 2:30 pm When Asuka kicks Shinji in 2.0 she did something similar in Girlfriend of Steel, although this was because she had run out of the bath after one of the TRIDENTs appears in Tokyo-3 and Shinji saw her on the balcony ([url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C901AEdA6JI[/url] - 1st minute). Are there any other nods to the other spinoffs/extra-canon material that have appeared?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 20, 2012 4:43 pm In 1.xx we see what appear to be Shinji's bike from the flashback in the manga version. I kept meaning to mention it in the 1.11 review I posted ages ago, but it didn't seem relevant to anything else I had written.

[]: Re: Nods to Eva spinoffs in Rebuild             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 20, 2012 4:53 pm AR-99 wrote: Are there any other nods to the other spinoffs/extra-canon material that have appeared?

[]: Re: Nods to Eva spinoffs in Rebuild             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Fri Jul 20, 2012 7:53 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Whether tongue-in-cheek or just coincidence, events from the After The End audio drama have been appearing in the New Movie Edition.

[]:             Quote Post by TomasJC » Mon Jul 30, 2012 2:02 pm Either that, or the children all become part of an elite 'Power Rangers' type squad.

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Mon Jul 30, 2012 4:44 pm TomasJC wrote: Either that, or the children all become part of an elite 'Power Rangers' type squad.
